title: Retail Associate (Precious Metals Industry)
description:
Role Overview

The Retail Associate is responsible for delivering a professional, discreet, and high-quality client experience within a high-value retail environment specializing in physical precious metals. This role combines front-of-house customer service excellence with strong operational discipline, including transaction accuracy, compliance support, and inventory coordination.

The ideal candidate demonstrates the service mindset of luxury retail, coupled with the precision, integrity, and procedural awareness required in the precious metals industry.

Key Responsibilities

Client Service & Sales

  • Greet and assist walk-in and appointment-based clients in a courteous and professional manner.

  • Provide clear and accurate product information on bullion bars, coins, and related precious-metal products.

  • Support clients throughout the purchase, sale, and collection process, ensuring clarity, confidence, and discretion.

  • Maintain a calm, polished, and service-oriented presence aligned with a premium brand environment.

  • Build rapport with clients to support repeat business and long-term relationships.

Transaction & Operational Support

  • Execute retail transactions accurately using the point-of-sale and internal systems.

  • Prepare customer orders, documentation, and collection handovers in accordance with internal procedures.

  • Assist with order fulfillment, coordination with vault or logistics teams, and client collection scheduling.

  • Support daily retail operations, including opening and closing procedures.

Compliance & Process Adherence

  • Assist with Know Your Customer (KYC) documentation collection and verification in accordance with company policies and regulatory requirements.

  • Ensure all transactions and records are complete, accurate, and audit-ready.

  • Adhere strictly to internal controls, security protocols, and confidentiality requirements.

Inventory & Retail Floor Support

  • Assist with stock handling, basic inventory checks, and reconciliation activities as required.

  • Maintain a clean, organized, and presentable retail space at all times.

  • Support periodic stock-takes and internal audits when required.

Required Qualifications & Experience

  • Minimum one to three years of experience in customer-facing roles, preferably in retail, luxury goods, banking, hospitality, or financial services.

  • Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with a calm and professional demeanor.

  • High attention to detail and accuracy, especially when handling high-value items and documentation.

  • Basic proficiency in Microsoft Office or equivalent systems.

  • Ability to follow structured procedures and compliance requirements consistently.

Working Conditions

  • Able to work Retail hours, including Saturdays or as required.

  • In-person role involving direct interaction with high-value physical assets.

  • Professional dress and conduct standards apply at all times.

postedCompany.description:
About us


Indigo Precious Metals Group (IPM Group Pte Ltd) is a leading Singapore-based bullion specialist providing clients with a full spectrum of services in physical precious metals trading, secure vaulting, and wealth preservation solutions.


With a strong reputation for trust, transparency, and operational excellence, IPM Group serves a global clientele ranging from private investors to institutional clients. Our operations are supported by rigorous compliance standards and integrated logistics covering procurement, trading, storage, and delivery of gold, silver, platinum, and other precious metals.


As an MAS-registered and LBMA-affiliated company, IPM Group upholds the highest standards of accountability and precision in financial and inventory reporting. Joining our team means becoming part of a dynamic environment that values integrity, attention to detail, and continuous professional growth.

  • Unwavering commitment to professional service support at all times.
  • Access to the world’s most pre-eminent and secure storage facilities.
  • Wholly segregated and fully allocated vaulted accounts, held exclusively in each client’s family name.
  • Highly competitive rates designed to deliver superior value to our clients.
  • Comprehensive market research and advisory support to empower informed client decisions.
postedCompany.name: INDIGO PRECIOUS METALS PTE. LTD.
